sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48751" key="qhrioeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θηριο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n48751.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a wild beast</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
